name: insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month, manual data entry causes reporting delays. We automate data extraction instead of manual data entry and reporting.
problem_solved: Manual data entry from claim forms leads to errors and delays in reporting.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual data entry from claim forms leads to errors and delays in reporting.
